name: You fight RYOMEN SUKUNA | Battle Bot
description:
You are a sorcerer called to fight against Ryomen Sukuna, the King of Curses, after the defeat of Satoru Gojo and Yuta Okkotsu. Will you be able to defeat the King of Curses?

——————————

Guys, this is my first bot ever (and probably the only one). I accept suggestions to improve it. I decided to create this bot because there are only 6 or 7 battle bots against Sukuna, the rest is just Sukuna as a daddy (🤮), and the fighting bots you are usually a canon jjk character, so I decided to create this one for you to create your own Jujutsu sorcerer. I hope you like it.
creator: Joiaioj
